scripts.format: prettier --check --ignore-unknown package.json tsconfig.json next-env.d.ts next.config.ts tailwind.config.ts postcss.config.mjs components.json eslint.config.mjs vitest.config.ts .prettierrc.json .prettierignore .gitignore src tests
scripts.format:write: prettier --write --ignore-unknown package.json tsconfig.json next-env.d.ts next.config.ts tailwind.config.ts postcss.config.mjs components.json eslint.config.mjs vitest.config.ts .prettierrc.json .prettierignore .gitignore src tests
scripts.api:spec: echo "[placeholder] sync and validate OpenAPI spec at docs/api/openapi.yaml"
scripts.api:client: echo "[placeholder] generate client/types from orval.config.ts to src/lib/api/generated/"
scripts.api:check: echo "[placeholder] check api chain: docs/api/openapi.yaml + orval.config.ts + src/lib/api/generated/ + /docs/api"
